category_sources: source_facts.description identifies it as the libev port of Shadowsocks; official GitHub repository describes it as a libev Shadowsocks port.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is shadowsocks-libev; current_curation.display-name is shadowsocks-libev.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki and README provide project documentation, build notes, and usage information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/shadowsocks/shadowsocks-libev, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists ss-local, ss-server, ss-tunnel, and related commands; source_facts.description identifies Shadowsocks libev implementation.
